title: 'Everything is fine': Noam Bettan hits wrong note with ankle sprain after Eurovision high
description: Eurovision runner-up Noam Bettan took 'break a leg' a little too seriously; Bettan posted a photo on crutches but reassured fans: 'Next week we’re back in full force for performances'

title: SIAM Reportedly Urges Delhi Govt to Reconsider 2028 Petrol Two-Wheeler Ban
description: The Society of Indian Automobile Manufacturers (SIAM) urges the government to reconsider its plan of scrapping new registrations of Petrol Two-Wheelers from 2028.

title: Buffalo saved from Eid sacrifice after going viral due to resemblance to Trump
Fun to Do: Virginia Beach music festival, Journey, John Mulaney and more
description: Coming up: Comedian and actor John Mulaney is coming to Chrysler Hall; R&B singer and songwriter Ari Lennox will be at The Dome and more.

title: BBC 'sexism' fury from staff as Sarah Everard murder docudrama 'written by a man'
description: A television docudrama is set to be written by male screenwriter Jeff Pope.

title: Bugatti Is Already Working On Its Latest One-Off Hypercar
description: This new model will reportedly combine styling elements from the Bolide and the Tourbillon

title: Mini golf tournament to raise funds for TVCCA programs
description: The Thames Valley Council for Community Action hosts its second annual mini golf fundraiser in Oakdale on June 4.

title: Nagelsmann highlights Newcastle role issues for Woltemade ahead of World Cup

title: Man pleads guilty to driving 111mph on 40mph road
description: A 29-YEAR-OLD man has been warned he could face jail after being caught driving his motorbike at more than 110mph. Andrew Manuel Carvalho Franco appeared at the Magistrate’s Court yesterday to plead guilty to driving at nearly three times the Island’s maximum 40mph speed limit. He admitted a charge of dangerous driving after being clocked [...] The post Man pleads guilty to driving 111mph on 40mph road appeared first on Jersey Evening Post .

title: Norway Chess: Gukesh, Praggnanandhaa have awful day
